title: madhuca butyrospermoides
intro: Madhuca butyrospermoides, also known as the Buton tree, is a species of tree native to the Andaman and Nicobar Islands in India. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Madhuca butyrospermoides include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antidiabetic properties. The herbal preparations of the plant, such as its seeds and leaves, are traditionally used to make medicinal concoctions, including decoctions and infusions.
